I have nord ce 3 lite and photos on it look so terrible
Are you using some third party app?

No bro, these are taken on the stock camera app. 

I've tried Open Camera which is available on Play Store but I didn't get used to it very much. I just take all of these using the Pro mode in the stock camera app
And then I edit a little using Google's Snapseed app

Might be a skill issue then on my side
Could you enlighten me a bit if possible?
Tbh, I just went with the flow, don't think about what you should do in specific situations, just explore everything that is there and eventually you'd get the idea
do anyone here to how to do photohraphy?

Just start taking photos of surrounding, later you wonder something is not fitting right, you find something about filters and lights and angles and tones and many more.
And eventually you get good at it.
And that's it.
